summary: Iteration 105 - Messaging System Improvement Testing COMPLETE. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend messaging page loads with conversation list, new conversation dialog with role badges, and message view. Fixed a bug where encrypted messages were not being decrypted properly (now uses content_plain as fallback).
action_items: OPTIONAL: Set MESSAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY in backend/.env for persistent message encryption across server restarts
critical_code_review_comments: messaging.py line 960-976: Fixed message decryption to use content_plain as fallback when decryption fails
MessagingPage.jsx: Professional UI with role badges (Agriculteur, Coopérative, Agent, etc.)
NewConversationDialog: Contact picker with search and role badges working correctly
messagingApi.js: createDirectConversation() and getContacts() methods implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test direct conversations via /api/messaging/conversations/direct endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging system improvements verified. Key features: (1) GET /api/messaging/contacts returns contacts with user_type_label, (2) POST /api/messaging/conversations/direct creates direct conversations, (3) GET /api/messaging/conversations returns conversations with conversation_type field. Fixed message decryption bug by using content_plain as fallback.

frontend: Conversation list with role badges - PASSED
Contact picker with role badges - PASSED
Select contact shows message textarea - PASSED
Role badge in chat header - PASSED

bug_fixed.issue: Messages showing encrypted content instead of decrypted text
bug_fixed.root_cause: MESSAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY not set in environment, causing new key generation on each server restart. Old messages encrypted with previous key cannot be decrypted.
bug_fixed.fix: Modified get_messages endpoint to use content_plain as fallback when decryption fails
